items.name: Aalu Tikki Burger
items.description: Crispy aloo tikki inside soft bun with fresh onion, lettuce and tangy sauce. Proper desi street burger, garma garam and full mast flavour.

items.name: Schezwan Burger
items.description: Spicy schezwan sauce with crunchy veggies and juicy veg patty inside toasted bun. Slight Indo-Chinese kick, perfect for spice lovers.

items.name: Cheesy Garlic Burger
items.description: Soft burger bun filled with juicy patty, creamy garlic mayo and melted cheese. Rich aroma, buttery taste, ekdum cheesy satisfaction.

items.name: Manchurian Burger
items.description: Fusion style burger with crispy manchurian patty, tangy sauce and crunchy veggies. Indo-Chinese street flavour packed inside soft toasted bun.

items.name: Veg Lovers Burger
items.description: Loaded burger with fresh vegetables, crunchy lettuce and balanced sweet-spicy sauce. Light yet full flavour, perfect for veggie lovers.

items.name: Korean Burger
items.description: Juicy patty coated with spicy sweet Korean style sauce, fresh lettuce and crunchy veggies. Unique flavour twist with addictive street taste.

items.name: African Peri Peri Burger
items.description: Fiery peri peri sauce layered over juicy patty with fresh vegetables. Spicy, tangy and bold flavour that wakes up your taste buds.

items.name: La Mexicano Burger
items.description: Mexican style burger with spicy seasoning, crunchy veggies and zesty sauce. Slight tangy kick with bold flavour in every bite.

items.name: Tandoori Tadka Burger
items.description: Smoky tandoori masala patty with creamy tadka sauce and fresh vegetables. Desi flavour explosion inside soft bun, warm and satisfying.

items.name: Jain Chipotle Burger
items.description: Jain friendly burger with smoky chipotle flavour and crunchy vegetables. Simple ingredients but bold taste, clean and satisfying bite.

items.name: Punjabi Makni Burger
items.description: Rich buttery makni sauce layered over juicy patty with fresh veggies. Creamy Punjabi flavour giving proper comfort food feeling.

items.name: Hot Like Hill Burger
items.description: Super spicy burger with fiery lava style sauce and crunchy vegetables. Heat lovers favourite, bold flavour with thrilling spicy punch.

items.name: Shahi Hydrabadi Burger
items.description: Premium style burger with rich creamy sauce, soft bun and cheesy layers. Smooth royal flavour inspired by classic Hyderabadi taste.

items.name: Bhau Special Open Burger
items.description: House special open burger with double tikki, melted cheese and signature sauce. Big portion, full flavour and proper street food satisfaction.

items.name: Classic Salted Fries
items.description: Golden crispy potato fries sprinkled with perfect salt. Crunchy outside, soft inside, garma garam snack that goes perfectly with ketchup or mayo.

items.name: Peri Peri Fries
items.description: Hot crispy fries tossed in spicy peri peri seasoning. Tangy, fiery and slightly chatpata flavour that makes every bite exciting.

items.name: Loaded Fries
items.description: Fresh crispy fries topped with creamy sauces and melted cheese. Messy, cheesy and fully satisfying street style snack for true fast-food lovers.

items.name: Cheese Chilli Sandwich
items.description: Toasted bread stuffed with creamy cheese and spicy green chilli chutney. Crunchy outside, melty inside, perfect street style sandwich.

items.name: Schezwan Chilli Sandwich
items.description: Crispy toasted sandwich with fiery schezwan chutney and crunchy vegetables. Spicy Indo-Chinese flavour with bold street food kick.

items.name: Cheese Corn Sandwich
items.description: Sweet corn mixed with creamy cheese inside toasted sandwich. Light, cheesy and comforting snack with smooth balanced taste.

items.name: Cheese Garlic Sandwich
items.description: Toasted sandwich layered with buttery garlic flavour and melted cheese. Aroma is amazing and every bite feels rich and satisfying.

items.name: Masala Tikki Sandwich
items.description: Spicy aloo tikki with chutneys and crunchy vegetables inside grilled sandwich. Proper desi street food flavour in every bite.

items.name: Paneer Delight Sandwich
items.description: Soft paneer cubes mixed with spices inside crispy toasted bread. Rich, filling and perfect for paneer lovers.

items.name: Veg Grill Sandwich
items.description: Grilled sandwich filled with fresh vegetables and chutney. Light, crunchy and refreshing flavour with classic Indian street taste.

items.name: Indori Jumbo Sandwich
items.description: Big jumbo sandwich packed with spicy Indori style filling and crunchy toast. Heavy portion with bold masala flavour.

items.name: Bhau Special Manchurian Cheese Sandwich
items.description: Special sandwich stuffed with manchurian filling and melted cheese. Indo-Chinese fusion taste with crispy toasted bread.

items.name: Veg Pizza (7 inch)
items.description: Fresh vegetables layered on soft pizza base with melted cheese and rich tomato sauce. Light, colourful and garma garam classic veggie delight.

items.name: Double Cheese Veg Pizza (7 inch)
items.description: Extra cheese loaded pizza with fresh vegetables and creamy mozzarella layer. Every bite stretchy, cheesy and fully satisfying for cheese lovers.

items.name: Margherita Pizza (7 inch)
items.description: Classic Italian style pizza with rich tomato base, melted mozzarella and herbs. Simple, cheesy and comforting taste everyone enjoys.

items.name: Italian Pizza (7 inch)
items.description: Herb seasoned pizza topped with vegetables and melted cheese on crispy base. Aromatic Italian flavour with soft centre and crunchy crust.

items.name: 4 Cheese Pizza (7 inch)
items.description: Premium pizza loaded with four rich cheeses melting together beautifully. Creamy texture, bold flavour and super indulgent bite for true cheese fans.

items.name: Cheese Corn Pizza (7 inch)
items.description: Sweet corn and melted cheese layered on crispy pizza base. Slight sweet taste with creamy cheese giving balanced and comforting flavour.

items.name: Tandoori Paneer Pizza (7 inch)
items.description: Smoky tandoori paneer cubes on cheesy pizza base with Indian spices. Proper desi twist with spicy aroma and bold flavour.

items.name: Makhni Paneer Pizza (7 inch)
items.description: Paneer cubes coated in buttery makhni sauce on cheesy crust. Creamy, rich and full Punjabi flavour in every bite.

items.name: Peri Peri Paneer Pizza (7 inch)
items.description: Spicy peri peri paneer cubes layered on melted cheese pizza base. Bold flavour with fiery kick and soft cheesy texture.

items.name: Cheese Burst Pizza (7 inch)
items.description: Pizza base filled with molten cheese inside crust and topped with extra cheese. Super creamy, stretchy and perfect for hardcore cheese lovers.

items.name: Cheesy 7 Pizza (7 inch)
items.description: Premium pizza loaded with seven rich cheeses creating deep creamy flavour. Smooth texture and luxurious cheesy taste in every bite.

items.name: Cheese Garlic Bread
items.description: Crispy toasted bread topped with buttery garlic spread and melted cheese. Amazing aroma with crunchy bite and soft cheesy centre.

items.name: Schezwan Garlic Bread
items.description: Garlic bread layered with spicy schezwan sauce and herbs. Slight Indo-Chinese heat with crispy bread and bold flavour.

items.name: Peri Peri Garlic Bread
items.description: Toasted garlic bread sprinkled with peri peri seasoning. Tangy, spicy and crunchy snack perfect with burgers or fries.

items.name: Makni Garlic Bread
items.description: Garlic bread topped with creamy makhni style sauce and herbs. Rich buttery flavour with warm desi twist.

items.name: Cheesy 7 Garlic Bread
items.description: Premium garlic bread loaded with rich cheese layers. Super creamy, extra cheesy and perfect indulgent snack.

items.name: Veg Loaded Bread
items.description: Garlic bread topped with vegetables, cheese and sauces. Colourful, crunchy and full street style flavour in every bite.

items.name: Cheesy Sauce
items.description: Warm creamy cheese dip with smooth texture and rich flavour. Perfect partner for fries, burgers and garlic bread.

items.name: 1000 Island
items.description: Creamy sweet-tangy sauce with light tomato flavour. Classic dip that perfectly matches burgers and sandwiches.

items.name: MOMO Chutney
items.description: Spicy momo style chutney with bold garlic and chilli flavour. Street style dip that adds fiery punch to snacks.

items.name: Peri Peri Sauce
items.description: Hot peri peri dip with tangy chilli flavour. Perfect for fries and burgers when you want extra spicy kick.

items.name: Makni Sauce
items.description: Rich buttery makhni sauce with mild spices and creamy texture. Desi style dip adding Punjabi flavour to snacks.

items.name: Mayonnaise
items.description: Smooth creamy mayonnaise with mild tangy flavour. Classic dip that balances spicy snacks and enhances burger taste.
